selected_calibration.note: blend fitted by penalized maximum likelihood (logistic stacking); equivalent to (w, T, s) via w=a/(a+b), T=1/(a+b), s=c. If the unconstrained fit had T < temperature_floor, coefficients were projected to T = temperature_floor (no sharpening) and the intercept was refit.

selection_rule: Minimize unconstrained March log loss; deploy stacker with temperature floor T>=1 (no sharpening).
